channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Friday, June 19
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 09:16 AM (1.23 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 02:05 AM (-0.154 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: W 17 G 23 mph
